commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs human PR handling because a protected maintainer-labeled delivery PR has a P1 same-session routing blocker and missing contributor real-behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The patch has a concrete privacy-sensitive routing concern: a stale final payload can be delivered through a fresh entry from a different logical session.; Review finding: [P1] Guard refreshed routing... (sha=3f78d301e24d6fcfe8ecb8c949652efd2cdd0b8e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a fresh session-store reread before final delivery gives up on a no-send route, updates delivery tests, re-exports `loadSessionStore` for the command runtime, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is present for the exact reported Discord/progress failure. Source inspection and the PR's mocked regression do show the no-target stale-route boundary that the patch is trying to fix.
commands.review_followup: Needs human PR handling because a protected maintainer-labeled delivery PR has a P1 same-session routing blocker and missing contributor real-behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: Harden final delivery routing refresh
target.body:
Summary:
- Refresh session delivery routing once before final delivery fails with a no-send routing outcome.
- Keep the existing durable send path as the only place that actually sends final payloads, so the refresh cannot duplicate platform sends.
- Add a focused regression covering stale session routing followed by fresh delivery context.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts`
- Testbox-through-Crabbox `tbx_01kryv56rw77vtk5cczvapkca2`: `pnpm check:changed`
- AWS Crabbox `cbx_64aa68f9bd6a` (`jade-hermit`), run `run_e59866f37ad4`: live Discord final-delivery refresh proof
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Related:
- Refs #83744.
- Related to #49055.

Real behavior proof:
- Behavior addressed: final delivery can fail before any platform send is attempted when routing is resolved from stale session state.
- Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox `cbx_64aa68f9bd6a` (`jade-hermit`) with a Convex-leased `discord` credential, plus Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox (`tbx_01kryv56rw77vtk5cczvapkca2`) for changed gates.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: on PR head `3f78d301e24d6fcfe8ecb8c949652efd2cdd0b8e`, ran `node --import tsx scripts/dev/issue-83835-discord-final-delivery-refresh-proof.ts` on AWS Crabbox with Convex Discord credentials; also ran `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed` on Testbox-through-Crabbox.
- Evidence after fix: the live proof forced stale in-memory routing with no delivery context, supplied fresh session routing with a real Discord channel target, logged `[delivery] refreshed session routing before final delivery`, sent one real Discord message containing marker `ISSUE_83835_FINAL_REFRESH_760E7BE7`, observed it in-channel, and cleaned it up. The returned delivery status was `sent`, `attempted: true`, `succeeded: true`, `resultCount: 1`.
- Observed result after fix: stale/no-target routing no longer causes an immediate no-send final delivery failure when fresh session state has a valid target; the recovered path sends through normal durable Discord delivery exactly once.
- What was not tested: a clean live artifact showing #83744's exact stale Discord failed-progress surface suppressing a later successful final reply was not captured.
target.author: joshavant
